Product overview

What Are Our Vitamin D3 and K2 Tablets?

Getting enough vitamin D3 and vitamin K2 from your diet alone can be a bit of a stretch, especially with our famously changeable Irish weather! That’s where our high-strength Vitamin D3 and K2 Tablets step in to lend a hand.

Each tablet delivers 4000IU of vitamin D3 and 125µg of vitamin K2 MK7 , helping you enjoy the goodness of these two essential nutrients in just one handy tablet. With 365 tablets per bottle , our vitamin D3 K2 tablets give you a powerful boost for a complete year without reordering.

Benefits of Our D3 & K2 Vitamin Tablets

It’s no wonder D3 vitamin with K2 is such a popular pairing in the world of wellness supplements - they work hand in hand to bring out the best in each other! According to the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA), vitamin D contributes to:

  • Normal blood calcium levels*
  • Maintenance of normal bones*
  • Maintenance of normal muscle function*
  • Maintenance of normal teeth*
  • Normal absorption/ tilisation of calcium and phosphorus*
  • Normal function of the immune system*
  • Has a role in the process of cell division*
  • EFSA has also researched the benefits of vitamin K and states that it contributes to:
  • The maintenance of normal bones*
  • Normal blood clotting*
Why Choose WeightWorld's Vitamin D3 K2 Tablets?
  • Here's how our Vitamin D3 and K2 MK7 Tablets stand out from regular vitamin D supplements -
  • Packs 4000IU of Vitamin D3 and 125µg of K2 MK7 per tablet - no need for multiple tablets a day to get your essential vitamins sorted
  • Made with 100% natural ingredients and free from GMOs and Magnesium stearate, so you can enjoy the benefits with no known side effects
  • Vegetarian-friendly formula, ideal for topping up their daily vitamin D3 K2 needs without depending on animal-based food sources
  • A full 1-year supply in every bottle - far better value for money compared to many others that only cover you for 2 months
  • Backed by a 90-day money-back guarantee to let you enjoy the D3 & K2 vitamin tablets with confidence
  • GMP-certified for your peace of mind, ensuring safe and reliable intake for you and your family
How to use

Take 1 tablet daily with water, preferably with a meal.

Ingredients

Microcrystalline Cellulose, Rice Extract, Silicon Dioxide

Nutritional information

Serving Size: 1 Tablets Servings per Container : 365

Amount per servingAmount%NRV
Vitamin D3 (Source : Lanolin)4000 IU2000
Vitamin K2 (MK-7)125 mcg166
Advice and storage

Do not exceed the recommended daily dose. Food supplements must not be used as a substitute for a varied and balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle. If you are pregnant, breastfeeding, taking any medications or are under medical supervision, please consult a healthcare professional before use. Discontinue use if any adverse reactions occur. Not intended for use by persons under the age of 18.

Store in a cool, dry place. Keep out of reach of children. For best before end see the base.
